Title: Transcriptomic and biochemical analyses of the accumulation of sucrose in mungbean (Vigna radiata (L.) Wilczek) leaves after pod removal

Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Lower in depodded VC1973A than in control VC1973A; higher in depodded V2984 than in depodded VC1973A
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Downregulated after pod removal in VC1973A; relatively higher in depodded V2984
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq differential expression analysis; qRT-PCR validation; HPLC sucrose profiling
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Pod removal (depodding) at R6 stage; fourth trifoliate leaves sampled 5 days after treatment under field conditions
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative correlation with leaf sucrose content; reduced expression is associated with increased sucrose accumulation after pod removal in VC1973A
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Glycoside hydrolase family 1 beta-glucosidase; beta-mannosidase/glucosidase homolog
Pathway_Genes.Metabolic_Step_Position: Side-route affecting sugar utilization rather than direct sucrose synthesis
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Indirectly affects target product by regulating glucose release and sucrose utilization
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydrolyzes beta-D-glucosidic bonds in beta-D-glucosides and oligosaccharides to release glucose
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Major transport and storage carbohydrate linked to assimilate remobilization and pod/seed development
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Vradi01g05010.1 was identified as a DEG in starch and sucrose metabolism. 2. Its expression decreased after pod removal in VC1973A and was lower in depodded VC1973A than in depodded V2984. 3. The gene showed a negative correlation with leaf sucrose content and was proposed as a candidate affecting sucrose utilization for seed development via glucose regulation.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate marker/gene for improving synchronous pod maturity by modulating source-sink sucrose utilization in mungbean
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Annotated by Arabidopsis ortholog AT3G18080.1 (BGLU44); direct causal effect on sucrose not functionally proven beyond correlation and expression association

Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Lower in depodded VC1973A than in control VC1973A; higher in depodded V2984 than in depodded VC1973A
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Downregulated after pod removal in VC1973A; relatively higher in depodded V2984
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq differential expression analysis; qRT-PCR validation; HPLC sucrose profiling
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Pod removal (depodding) at R6 stage; fourth trifoliate leaves sampled 5 days after treatment under field conditions
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative correlation with leaf sucrose content; reduced expression is associated with increased sucrose accumulation after pod removal in VC1973A
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Glycoside hydrolase family 1 beta-glucosidase; monolignol beta-glucoside homolog
Pathway_Genes.Metabolic_Step_Position: Side-route affecting sugar utilization rather than direct sucrose synthesis
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Indirectly affects target product by regulating glucose release and sucrose utilization
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydrolyzes beta-D-glucosidic bonds in beta-D-glucosides and oligosaccharides to release glucose
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Major transport and storage carbohydrate linked to assimilate remobilization and pod/seed development
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Vradi10g08240.1 was identified as a DEG in starch and sucrose metabolism. 2. Its expression decreased after pod removal in VC1973A and was lower in depodded VC1973A than in depodded V2984. 3. The gene showed a negative correlation with leaf sucrose content and was proposed as a candidate affecting sucrose utilization for seed development via glucose regulation.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate marker/gene for improving synchronous pod maturity by modulating source-sink sucrose utilization in mungbean
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Annotated by Arabidopsis ortholog AT4G21760.1 (BGLU47); highlighted by authors as one of two main candidate genes

Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher in V2984 than in VC1973A in both control and depodded plants
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Constitutively higher in V2984 than VC1973A regardless of treatment
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq differential expression analysis; qRT-PCR validation
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with genotype-dependent differences in leaf sucrose metabolism, but no treatment-responsive causal conclusion was established
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Beta-glucosidase precursor, putative; glycoside hydrolase family
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Sucrose metabolism associated glucoside hydrolysis branch
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Indirect association with target sucrose level
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Putatively hydrolyzes beta-glucosides to release glucose
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Vradi08g02630.1 was more highly expressed in V2984 than VC1973A under both control and depodded conditions. 2. It was validated by qRT-PCR. 3. The study did not designate it as a primary candidate controlling sucrose accumulation after pod removal.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential background marker for genotype-specific sugar metabolism differences
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mentioned among common DEGs in starch and sucrose metabolism but not emphasized as main candidate gene by authors

Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher in VC1973A than in V2984 in both control and depodded plants
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Constitutively higher in VC1973A than V2984 regardless of treatment
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq differential expression analysis; qRT-PCR validation
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with genotype-dependent differences in leaf sucrose metabolism, but no direct causal effect on sucrose change after pod removal was established
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Vradi08g04870.1 was more highly expressed in VC1973A than in V2984 under both control and depodded conditions. 2. It was validated by qRT-PCR. 3. The study treated it as a DEG in starch and sucrose metabolism but did not identify it as a principal treatment-responsive candidate gene.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential candidate for modifying baseline sucrose biosynthetic capacity between mungbean genotypes
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Putative sucrose-phosphatase based on orthology to AT2G35840.3
